2604.11477.title: OOM-RL: Out-of-Money Reinforcement Learning Market-Driven Alignment for LLM-Based Multi-Agent Systems
2604.11477.paper_summary: The alignment of Multi-Agent Systems (MAS) for autonomous software engineering is constrained by evaluator epistemic uncertainty. Current paradigms, such as Reinforcement Learning from Human Feedback (RLHF) and AI Feedback (RLAIF), frequently induce model sycophancy, while execution-based environments suffer from adversarial "Test Evasion" by unconstrained agents. In this paper, we introduce an objective alignment paradigm: \textbf{Out-of-Money Reinforcement Learning (OOM-RL)}. By deploying agents into the non-stationary, high-friction reality of live financial markets, we utilize critical capital depletion as an un-hackable negative gradient. Our longitudinal 20-month empirical study (July 2024 -- February 2026) chronicles the system's evolution from a high-turnover, sycophantic baseline to a robust, liquidity-aware architecture. We demonstrate that the undeniable ontological consequences of financial loss forced the MAS to abandon overfitted hallucinations in favor of the \textbf{Strict Test-Driven Agentic Workflow (STDAW)}, which enforces a Byzantine-inspired uni-directional state lock (RO-Lock) anchored to a deterministically verified $\geq 95\%$ code coverage constraint matrix. Our results show that while early iterations suffered severe execution decay, the final OOM-RL-aligned system achieved a stable equilibrium with an annualized Sharpe ratio of 2.06 in its mature phase. We conclude that substituting subjective human preference with rigorous economic penalties provides a robust methodology for aligning autonomous agents in high-stakes, real-world environments, laying the groundwork for generalized paradigms where computational billing acts as an objective physical constraint
2604.11477.paper_summary_zh: 多代理系統（MAS）在自主軟體工程中的對齊受到評估者認識論不確定性的限制。當前的範式，如來自人類反饋的強化學習（RLHF）和AI反饋（RLAIF），經常導致模型的諂媚，而基於執行的環境則遭受不受限制的代理的對抗性“測試逃避”。在本文中，我們介紹了一種目標對齊範式：\textbf{超出資金強化學習（OOM-RL）}。通過將代理部署到非穩定的高摩擦現實的現金市場中，我們利用關鍵的資本耗損作為無法破解的負梯度。我們的長期20個月實證研究（2024年7月 - 2026年2月）記錄了系統從高周轉、諂媚基線演變為穩健的流動性感知架構的過程。我們證明了財務損失的不可否認的本體論後果迫使MAS放棄過度擬合的幻覺，轉而支持\textbf{嚴格測試驅動的代理工作流程（STDAW）}，該流程強制執行一種受拜占庭啟發的單向狀態鎖（RO-Lock），並固定在一個確定性驗證的$\geq 95\%$代碼覆蓋約束矩陣上。我們的結果顯示，雖然早期迭代遭受嚴重的執行衰退，但最終的OOM-RL對齊系統在其成熟階段達到了年化夏普比率2.06的穩定平衡。我們得出結論，將主觀的人類偏好替換為嚴格的經濟懲罰提供了一種穩健的方法論，用於在高風險的現實環境中對齊自主代理，為計算計費作為客觀物理約束的通用範式奠定了基礎。
2604.11477.author: Kun Liu et.al.
